reviews.review_description: Fun Indie Game for Kids with lots of music. It can be controlled by hands and adds extra excitement to the game. It's nice to have a lot of cars to race.
This VR racing game is very exciting to play. The auto-generated laps creates lot of options when every time you hit the track. Very fun game for everyone.

the driving is not the best, the controls could use some work and the handling of the car is very slippery so I think it’s ok but it needs a lot of work I think this game has amazing potential




Thank you for reading, this have a good day
